content: How can we build more reliable and trustworthy spatial intelligence? Happy to share our short paper
link_text: Towards the Uncertainty-aware Geospatial Artificial Intelligence
suffix: , exploring the future of uncertainty in GeoAI!

content: Can we truly trust the explanations provided by AI for spatial data? Our new paper
link_text: GeoXCP: uncertainty quantification of spatial explanations in explainable AI
suffix: is now available online in International Journal of Geographical Information Science, providing a framework to quantify XAI uncertainty.

content: Can AI autonomously "think" like a geographer to discover new spatial algorithms? Excited to share our preprint
link_text: GeoEvolve: Automating Geospatial Model Discovery via Multi-Agent Large Language Models
suffix: , a framework that couples evolutionary search with domain knowledge to automatically refine classical geospatial models like Kriging and GWR!

content: Looking for a model-agnostic way to measure the reliability of spatial predictions? We are excited to announce that
link_text: GeoConformal prediction: a model-agnostic framework of measuring the uncertainty of spatial prediction
suffix: is now published in Annals of the American Association of Geographers.
